title: Cognitive Firewalls Foundry
public_claim: The Cognitive Firewalls Foundry is the MuranoOS room that holds Nik Murano's capstone (Georgetown Applied Intelligence, cognitive-firewalls thesis) as a controlled experimental and interpretive system rather than a prose note page.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
